# Gem geometry attribution

The faceted stone geometry baked into `js/gem-model.js` derives from
["Diamond [Low-Poly]"](https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/diamond-low-poly-405cc8175019452daa01999fd1466731)
by **HanSoloSnipe**, published on Sketchfab under the
[Creative Commons Attribution](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/) license,
obtained via [gkjohnson/3d-demo-data](https://github.com/gkjohnson/3d-demo-data).

Changes made: node transforms applied, mesh recentered on its bounding-box
midpoint, vertex positions rounded to 5 decimals, and the convex-hull facet
planes precomputed. No textures or materials from the original are used —
shading is original to this site.
